product_info.company_description: The world's leading global foodservice retailer, serving millions of customers daily with quality, fast, and convenient food.
product_info.product_description: A juicy 100% beef patty topped with savory sauteed mushrooms, melted Swiss cheese, crispy onions, and our signature sauce on a toasted sesame seed bun.
product_info.target_audience: Adults 18-45 who appreciate premium burger flavors, foodies looking for a gourmet fast-food experience, and mushroom lovers
selling_points: Made with 100% pure beef, never frozen
Real sauteed mushrooms with garlic and herbs
Premium Swiss cheese, not processed American
Limited-time offering - available only for a short time
product_info.call_to_action: Try it today at your local McDonald's or order on the app!
product_info.additional_info: Emphasize the gourmet, premium quality of the burger. The mood should feel warm, appetizing, and crave-worthy. Highlight the melting Swiss cheese and sizzling mushrooms.

campaign_theme.slogan: Savor the Richness of Our Mushroom Swiss Burger
campaign_theme.theme: Indulge in a gourmet experience with every bite, showcasing the rich, savory flavors of premium ingredients that elevate your fast-food cravings.
campaign_theme.visual_style: Rich, close-up shots of the Mushroom Swiss Burger highlighting the melted Swiss cheese, sautéed mushrooms glistening with garlic, and crispy onions, set against a rustic wooden background to evoke a cozy and inviting atmosphere.
